title: caladenia applanata subsp. applanata
intro: Caladenia applanata subsp. applanata, also known as the Flat-lip Spider Orchid, is a species of orchid native to Western Australia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in the treatment of wounds and skin infections. The health benefits of Caladenia applanata subsp. applanata include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as eczema and acne. Caladenia applanata subsp. applanata can be prepared into various herbal forms, including tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be applied topically to the affected area.
